---
name: Feature request
description: Suggest a new feature or improvement
title: "[Feature] "
labels: ["enhancement"]
assignees: ""
---

## Problem or motivation
A clear description of the problem or motivation (e.g. "I always need to …").

## Proposed solution
What you would like to see (e.g. new flag, new report format, new data source).

## Alternatives considered
Any alternative solutions or workarounds you have considered.

## Additional context
Screenshots, docs references, or other context.
